examples: She groped for her glasses in the darkness of the bedroom

meanings.definition: make one's way clumsily or blindly
make a mess of, destroy or ruin
examples: I botched the dinner and we had to eat out
the pianist screwed up the difficult passage in the second movement

meanings.definition: drop or juggle or fail to play cleanly a grounder
showing lack of skill or aptitude
examples: his fumbling attempt to put up a shelf
